world.title: ‘Destroying New York’: Trump to Zohran Mamdani's pied-à-terre tax. What is it?
world.summary: US President Donald Trump criticized New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani's proposed pied-à-terre tax, which targets secondary residences valued over $5 million. Trump claimed the tax would harm New York, stating it is “destroying” the city. The policy aims to impose a surcharge on luxury properties, reflecting ongoing tensions between the federal and local government regarding taxation and housing issues.

world.title: PICS | USS Abraham Lincoln conducts US blockade operations in Arabian Sea
world.summary: USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72) is leading US blockade operations in the Arabian Sea, involving over 10,000 troops, 12 ships, and 100 aircraft. This initiative aims to restrict access to Iran’s ports and coastlines amid rising tensions in West Asia. The operations were confirmed by US Central Command (CENTCOM) on April 16, highlighting ongoing military engagement in the region.

world.title: The Palestinian woman on the cover of L'Espresso: Settlers were ready to kill us
world.summary: Meead Abu al-Rub, a 35-year-old Palestinian woman, gained international attention after appearing on the cover of L'Espresso. She recounted her experience of being harassed by Israeli settlers during the olive harvest last October. In an interview, she described the settlers' aggressive behavior, stating they were prepared to harm her and others, highlighting the ongoing tensions in the region.

business.title: Trent to consider bonus issue to investors on April 22
business.summary: Trent Ltd announced that its board will meet on April 22 to consider a bonus issue of shares for investors, pending shareholder approval. Additionally, the company will release its financial results on the same day. This meeting aims to address both the potential bonus share issuance and the financial performance of the company for the relevant period.

business.title: Bonus alert: Tata Group multibagger to consider first bonus share issue; details here
business.summary: Trent Limited will evaluate its first-ever bonus share issue during its board meeting on April 22. The meeting will also address the company's financial results, dividend distribution, and fundraising strategies. This consideration comes in light of a significant decline in the stock price of the Tata Group retailer, prompting discussions on measures to enhance shareholder value.

business.title: Kinetic Electric Scooter Review - The One You’re Waiting For?
business.summary: The Kinetic DX electric scooter was reviewed during a media ride event in Pune. Launched in July 2025 by Kinetic Watts and Volts Ltd under Ajinkya Firodia, the scooter aims to revitalize the brand in India's two-wheeler market. The review highlighted various pros and cons of the Kinetic DX, providing insights into its performance and features.

technology.title: Google updates AI Mode in Chrome desktop for US users: Here’s what is changing
technology.summary: Google is updating its Chrome desktop browser in the US to improve user experience by reducing "tab hopping." This update aims to streamline online research and shopping. The enhancements include multiple upgrades to AI Mode, designed to make browsing more efficient. Users can expect a more cohesive experience as Google implements these changes to address common frustrations.

technology.title: YouTube Lets Users Turn Off Shorts with New Time Controls
technology.summary: YouTube has introduced a feature allowing users to set a daily limit of zero minutes for Shorts, effectively hiding short-form videos. This update aims to reduce short video consumption and includes stricter controls for supervised teen accounts. The rollout represents YouTube's most direct effort to address concerns regarding short-form content, as reported by The Verge.

technology.title: Call screening, other AI features coming to Galaxy S25 with next One UI 8.5 beta
technology.summary: Samsung is set to introduce new AI features, including call screening, to the Galaxy S25 through the upcoming One UI 8.5 beta. These enhancements, initially launched with the Galaxy S26 series, aim to improve user experience on older devices. The update will bring several existing features up to date, benefiting current Galaxy S25 users.

sports.title: IPL 2026: Match 27, SRH vs CSK Match Prediction
sports.summary: Match 27 of IPL 2026 features Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH) facing Chennai Super Kings (CSK) at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium in Hyderabad. Fans and analysts are eager to predict the outcome of this exciting contest. For insights and predictions regarding the match, visit CricTracker.com. The match promises to be a significant event in the ongoing tournament.

sports.title: Cummins to join SRH on Friday; targets April 25 return
sports.summary: Cummins is set to join Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH) on Friday, with head coach Daniel Vettori confirming his arrival later that evening. Vettori mentioned that Cummins aims to return to the playing XI by April 25. He also indicated that changes to the SRH lineup for the upcoming match against Chennai Super Kings (CSK) may occur based on conditions.

sports.title: Gujarat Titans sign Esterhuizen as replacement for injured Banton
sports.summary: Gujarat Titans have signed South African wicketkeeper-batter Connor Esterhuizen as a replacement for the injured Tom Banton. Esterhuizen made his T20I debut against New Zealand in March and was recognized as the Player of the Series. His addition aims to strengthen the team following Banton's injury, enhancing their roster for upcoming matches in the tournament.

health.title: Five more children die as measles outbreak worsens in Bangladesh
health.summary: Five more children have died in Bangladesh within the last 24 hours due to a worsening measles outbreak, exacerbating pressures on the country's healthcare system. The Directorate General of Health Services reports that the situation is critical, with increasing cases straining resources. Authorities are urging vaccination efforts to combat the outbreak and prevent further fatalities among vulnerable populations.

health.title: 7 morning habits that are quietly straining your arteries over time; cardiologist explains impact on heart
health.summary: Certain morning habits, such as excessive caffeine consumption, can adversely affect heart health, according to cardiologist Dr. Manoj. He emphasizes that small lifestyle adjustments are crucial for maintaining arterial health. The choices made in the morning, including diet, exercise timing, and screen usage, play a significant role in establishing the body's physiological state for the day.

health.title: Do Men Get Breast Cancer? The Silent Risk Factors Most Males Ignore
health.summary: Male breast cancer, though rare, poses significant health risks and often goes unrecognized. Symptoms can be subtle, with the most common sign being a painless lump beneath the nipple. Awareness is crucial, as many associate breast cancer primarily with women. Ignoring potential signs can lead to delayed diagnosis and treatment, emphasizing the need for increased male awareness of this condition.

science.title: Nobody Thought a Material Could Beat Copper at Heat Transfer. This One Just Did by a Landslide
science.summary: Researchers have discovered a new metallic material, theta-phase tantalum nitride (θ-TaN), which significantly outperforms copper in heat transfer efficiency. This breakthrough, led by Yongjie Hu from UCLA, challenges copper's century-long dominance in thermal conductivity. The findings could have substantial implications for various industries, potentially leading to the development of more efficient thermal management systems and technologies.

science.title: Scientists Reveal the One Creature Most Likely to Survive Earth's Final Catastrophe
science.summary: Scientists from Oxford and Harvard have identified a creature likely to survive Earth's final catastrophe, challenging the common belief that cockroaches would endure. Their research focused on resilience and adaptability in extreme conditions. The findings suggest that this creature possesses unique traits that enable it to withstand severe environmental changes, positioning it as the ultimate survivor in a planet-sterilizing event.

science.title: Artemis astronaut says heat shield suffered some charring on re-entry
science.summary: Astronauts from NASA's Artemis II mission reported a smooth re-entry to Earth after their 10-day test flight. However, the mission's commander noted some charring on the Orion capsule's critical heat shield. The crew successfully completed their journey around the moon and back, marking a significant milestone for NASA's lunar exploration efforts. Further analysis of the heat shield is expected.

entertainment.title: Viral AI video shows Rakesh Bedi's character from 'Dhurandhar 2' telling his big secret to Yalina, netizens can't keep calm
entertainment.summary: Aditya Dhar’s film 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge,' released on March 19, has achieved significant box office success. A viral AI video features Rakesh Bedi's character revealing a secret to Yalina, generating excitement among netizens. The film showcases a strong cast, including Ranveer Singh and Arjun Rampal, contributing to its record-breaking performance since its debut.

entertainment.title: 'Currently weeping': Alia Bhatt breaks down in tears at sister Shaheen Bhatt's engagement to Ishaan Mehra
entertainment.summary: Alia Bhatt expressed her joy and emotions over her sister Shaheen Bhatt's engagement to Ishaan Mehra, a former swimmer. The couple announced their engagement on Instagram with a heartfelt photo, captioning it, “We may have overdone this whole liking each other thing.” Alia shared her reaction, stating, “Currently weeping,” as she celebrated the happy news alongside other celebrities.

entertainment.title: Horoscope Tomorrow, April 18, 2026: Your zodiac insights await
entertainment.summary: On April 18, 2026, Aries individuals may impress colleagues with their confidence at work. They will need to exercise patience and firmness when dealing with rebellious behavior at home. Financially, buying or selling property could be advantageous. Additionally, while traveling, it is advised to remain present and mindful to enhance the overall experience.
